title: moraea afro-orientalis
intro: Moraea afro-orientalis, also known as the Yellow Corn Lily or Desert Corn Lily, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Iridaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Moraea afro-orientalis are said to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, and it is often used in traditional African medicine.
